component.name: DropdownMenu
component.description: A floating panel of selectable items. Shared dropdown primitive used by AppHeader (user menu) and Select (custom listbox). Supports both menu and listbox ARIA roles.

when: Displaying a list of selectable items anchored to a trigger element
Showing a contextual user menu in AppHeader (listRole=menu)

patterns.name: user-context-menu
patterns.description: AppHeader renders DropdownMenu anchored below the user button trigger using absolute positioning.

patterns.name: custom-select
patterns.description: Select renders DropdownMenu as a custom listbox anchored below its trigger button.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using DropdownMenu for navigation with URLs
antiPatterns.reason: Items are <div role='menuitem'>, not anchors. Navigation links need <a> elements for correct semantics.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use a nav element with anchor links for navigation.

antiPatterns.scenario: Rendering DropdownMenu outside a position:relative container
antiPatterns.reason: The panel is absolutely positioned and will be offset incorrectly without a positioned ancestor.
antiPatterns.alternative: Always wrap the trigger and DropdownMenu in a position:relative container.

purpose.menu: Contextual action menu. Items get role=menuitem. Use for AppHeader user menu.
purpose.listbox: Form select dropdown. Items get role=option with aria-selected. Use for custom Select.

states.description: Panel visible; items in resting state.
Neutral background on the hovered or focused item.
Brand text colour and semibold weight on the currently selected item (listbox role only).

accessibility.role: menu or listbox (controlled via listRole prop)

keyboardInteractions.action: Closes the dropdown and returns focus to the trigger
Moves focus between items (tabIndex=0 on each item)
